steps.t: The mine carts are in Nud-melek at the northern cross-roads of Sudulthurkh. Mazog's forces are dragging mining-carts filled with supplies through Nud-…
Svanr can be found near Sudulthurkh in northern Nud-melek. You should tell Svanr that you have destroyed several carts of the goblins in Nud-melek, hi…
